examples: I hung there, scrabbling with my feet to find a foothold.
Businesses are investing millions of dollars to gain a foothold in this new market.
The bid went instead to Fuji, which exploited its sponsorship to win a permanent foothold in the marketplace.
In July 2005 it bought Delphi's battery business, gaining a big foothold in Asia.
Over the years, the holiday has gained a foothold in the United States, too.
